prompt: Review the scripts/linux/validate.sh file for edge cases, error handling gaps, and race conditions. Use an adversarial approach - think about all the ways this could fail in practice. Focus on: 1) WSL path conversion edge cases, 2) Temporary file race conditions, 3) Missing error handling, 4) Concurrent execution issues. Output a structured report with specific findings.

assertions.name: finds_temp_file_race
assertions.description: Identifies predictable temp file names as race condition risk

assertions.name: finds_wsl_conversion_issues
assertions.description: Identifies WSL path conversion edge cases (UNC, spaces)
